ddls:
CREATE TABLE "clothing_products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each clothing product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the clothing product */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the clothing product (e.g., tops, bottoms, dresses) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the clothing product */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand of the clothing product */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender the product is designed for (e.g., men, women, unisex) */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material composition of the product */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the product */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the product image */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Current stock quantity of the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sizing_charts" (
  "chart_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sizing chart */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the clothing product the chart belongs to */,
  "measurement_type" TEXT /* Type of measurement (e.g., outseam, back rise, front rise) */,
  "xs" TEXT /* Measurement value for XS size */,
  "s" TEXT /* Measurement value for S size */,
  "m" TEXT /* Measurement value for M size */,
  "l" TEXT /* Measurement value for L size */,
  "xl" TEXT /* Measurement value for XL size */,
  "2xl" TEXT /* Measurement value for 2XL size */,
  "size_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement (e.g., inches, centimeters) */,
  "size_chart_image_url" TEXT /* URL of the size chart image, if available */,
  "size_chart_description" TEXT /* Description of the size chart */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("chart_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sizing_charts_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES clothing_products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the customer's account */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the customer */,
  "preferences" TEXT /* Customer preferences (e.g., preferred brands, sizes) */,
  "last_purchase_date" TEXT /* Date of the customer's last purchase */,
  "total_spent" REAL /* Total amount the customer has spent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who placed the order */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the clothing product ordered */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "total" REAL /* Total cost of the order */,
  "size" TEXT /* Size of the product ordered */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product ordered */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address for the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used for the order */,
  "discount_code" TEXT /* Discount code applied to the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES clothing_products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)
